CREATE TABLE test_hash (id UInt32, value String);
INSERT INTO test_hash VALUES (3, 'A long string for testing the xxHash function.');
SELECT id, xxHash32(value) AS hash_32, xxHash64(value) AS hash_64 FROM test_hash;
CREATE TABLE test_hash_nested AS SELECT id, xxHash32(value) AS hash_32 FROM test_hash;
SELECT a.id, (SELECT xxHash64(b.value) FROM test_hash b WHERE b.id = a.id) AS hash_value FROM test_hash_nested a;
SELECT id, xxHash32(concat(value, 'suffix')) AS hash_combined FROM test_hash;
SELECT a.value, b.id, xxHash32(a.value) AS hash_value FROM test_hash a JOIN test_hash b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.id > 1;
WITH (SELECT max(id) FROM test_hash) AS max_id SELECT id, xxHash64(value) AS hash_val FROM test_hash WHERE id = max_id;
